name: Lightly Armored
summary: You have trained to master the use of light armor, gaining the following benefits.

documentBlocks.text: You have trained to master the use of light armor, gaining the following benefits.

items: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with light armor.

abilityIncrease.description: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.

highlights: Increase your Strength or Dexterity score by 1, to a maximum of 20.
You gain proficiency with light armor.
